cases.prompt: 게임 제작 사이클 시작해줘. 다크판타지 RTS 아이디어가 있어.
cases.expectation: Starts a new production cycle: run-id workspace, production brief, team materialization, Stage 1 tasks.

cases.prompt: Run the game production harness for my roguelike idea.
cases.expectation: Starts the full 5-role studio cycle from intake.

cases.prompt: 게임 하네스 돌려서 다음 사이클 진행해.
cases.expectation: Resumes from the newest task manifest and last retrospective.

cases.prompt: Start a production cycle for a 2.5D dark fantasy RTS targeting an internal playtest.
cases.expectation: Stage 1 concept/presentation/core-build flow with the playtest as the milestone beat.

cases.prompt: 스테이지 게이트 리뷰 해줘. G2 밸런스 수치가 밴드 안인지 확인하고 싶어.
cases.expectation: QA measures gates on the current build; director issues PASS/FIX/REDO verdicts with evidence.

cases.prompt: 밸런스 사이클 재진입해줘. QA가 무한조합 익스플로잇 찾았어.
cases.expectation: Emergency re-entry at Stage 2 with the exploit register pre-seeded.
Runs the cycle through Stage 3 ops-stability and play-impact gates.

cases.prompt: Run the studio on this GDD and give me gate verdicts.
cases.expectation: GDD normalized into a production brief; G1–G8 measured and gated.

cases.prompt: 수익화 지점이랑 밸런스가 충돌해. 기획-PM 협상 라운드 포함해서 사이클 돌려줘.
cases.expectation: Designer↔PM negotiation record flow with fairness caps and reward bands.

cases.prompt: 컨셉 잡고 코어루프 구현까지 1차 사이클만 돌려줘.
cases.expectation: Stage 1 only: concept, presentation spec, resources, core loop, draft gates.
Routes to game-build-log-triage.
Routes to general code refactoring.
Routes to steam-store-launch-ops.
Routes to game-performance-profiler.
Routes to web/frontend skills.
Answered directly; no production cycle.
General conversation; not production.
Routes to game-demo-feedback-triage.
Routes to ab-test-analysis.
Routes to bmad-idea pre-production ideation.
